textPreview: {"overview":"The session identified a broad set of UI/backend bugs in the Weekly Commit app, then pivoted to preparing a Duet-style multi-step sweep to systematically search and fix them across the codebase. The core themes were: dark-mode contrast regressions from hard-coded neutral Tailwind classes, raw UUIDs leaking into user-facing views, week-selection state drifting between routes, and a few…
